# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    environment:
      - node.name=${ELASTICSEARCH_NODE_NAME:-node1}
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.graph.enabled=false
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    environment:
      - LS_OPTS=-w 2
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/config:/etc/logstash/conf.d
      - /var/lib/docker/containers:/var/lib/docker/containers:ro
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - SERVER_NAME=kibana
      - ELASTIC_SEARCH_USERNAME=xpack.monitoring.ui.user
      - ELASTIC_SEARCH_PASSWORD=xpack.monitoring.ui.password
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.10.2
    environment:
      - SERVER_NAME=apm-server
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk

networks:
  elk:
    driver: bridge
